task_completion.description: Read the target coordinates from the provided text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window (using cat, less, etc.) displaying the contents of ~/Documents/lsb_targets.txt.

task_completion.description: Capture 4 LIGHT frames at 25-second exposure for each of the three targets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The KStars/Ekos Capture module showing a sequence queue configured for 4 LIGHT frames at 25s exposure, OR a file manager/terminal showing the resulting .fits files in /home/ga/Images/LSB_survey/targets/Malin 1/, Malin 2/, and UGC 1382/.

task_completion.description: Generate a sky view image for each target using the provided bash script.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window showing the execution of 'bash ~/capture_sky_view.sh /home/ga/Images/LSB_survey/targets/<target_name>/view.png --palette cool' for the targets, OR a file manager/image viewer showing the generated view.png files in the respective target directories.

task_completion.description: Capture 5 DARK frames at 25-second exposure for calibration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The KStars/Ekos Capture module showing a sequence queue configured for 5 DARK frames at 25s exposure, OR a file manager/terminal showing the resulting .fits files in /home/ga/Images/LSB_survey/calibration/darks_25s/.

task_completion.description: Create a survey report containing the names of the three targets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the creation and saving of 'lsb_survey_report.txt' in ~/Documents/ containing the text 'Malin 1', 'Malin 2', and 'UGC 1382'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the KStars/Ekos GUI to capture the LIGHT and DARK frames.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the KStars/Ekos application interface (Capture tab, Sequence Queue) rather than using terminal commands like 'touch' or 'cp' to mock the .fits files.

integrity.description: Verify that the sky view bash script was genuinely executed.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual terminal command being run with the '--palette cool' argument, rather than the agent manually moving or renaming pre-existing images.

integrity.description: Verify the survey report was actually saved to the correct file path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor should show the file saved at '/home/ga/Documents/lsb_survey_report.txt', or a terminal command (like 'echo ... > ...') should explicitly write to this path, rather than just printing the names to stdout.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires capturing exactly 4 LIGHT frames (25s exposure) for targets 'Malin 1', 'Malin 2', and 'UGC 1382' in their respective directories under /home/ga/Images/LSB_survey/targets/. It also requires generating a sky view image (view.png) for each target using the provided bash script with the '--palette cool' flag. Additionally, exactly 5 DARK frames (25s exposure) must be captured in /home/ga/Images/LSB_survey/calibration/darks_25s/. Finally, a report must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/lsb_survey_report.txt containing the three target names.
